description: Crafted for the cosmopolitan male, this bag from cabarelli is made with materials of superior quality. Wear this utilitarian, monochrome bag with formal or casual ensembles, and don't forget to style your outfit with matching accessories. Length: 20 cm Width: 40 cm Depth: 10 cm Made of leatherette Two main zippered compartments Laptop holder with a click lock in the first compartment Two zippered and pockets on the front Adjustable, detachable shoulder strap Two short handles with a Velcro patch to use as one handle Care Wipe with a clean dry cloth to remove dust
